---
title: "The Rev. Stephen Henry Saxby"
---

## The Rev. Stephen Henry Saxby

**Dates:** (1831-1886)

### Description

Vicar of All Saints, East Clevedon

### Biography

He married (1862) Jane Euphemia Browne (1810/11-1898).

### Letters

- Letter from July 2, 1881.

---

[← Back to all letters](../letters.html)
